toolchain_notes: Python 3.14 + anyio plugin autoload + Windows = OSError [WinError 10106] at asyncio backend init. Workaround: PYTEST_DISABLE_PLUGIN_AUTOLOAD=1 + explicit -p no:debugging -p no:cacheprovider. Separate follow-up slice should pin pytest plugins or add pyproject.toml pytest config.

tier_routing_draft.title: Worker And Model Routing governance
tier_routing_draft.notes: Playbook section landed on ops/orchestrator-v2 as commit c42e8d6.

op2_lane.name: Op 2: OSS unification + upstream-fork integration model
op2_lane.path_decision_notes: Path B approved: archive current origin/main as refs/tags/oss-main-pre-unify, then force-update origin/main to the private-lane merged SHA. Path A rejected because preserving unrelated lineage drags a branching history into the 'one clean codebase' OSS story.
op2_lane.ordering_decision_notes: PR #90 merged first (merge commit, 4-commit history preserved); main then force-updated to the merge SHA. Preserves PR #90 as a real review artifact in history.

upstream_fork_model.principle: Use upstream repos as intended by GitHub. Slim seams, replaceable adapters, minimum integration. JobPipe is the engine; the forked/external repos are noise-reducing surfaces up until the candidate presses apply.

reactive_resume.role: GUI/editor for structured resumes + structured JSON interchange surface
reactive_resume.integration: upstream-as-intended via JSON round-trip CLIs (jobpipe import-reactive-resume, jobpipe export-reactive-resume-plan, jobpipe record-reactive-resume-document)
reactive_resume.canonical_ownership: stays in JobPipe (evidence selection, claim targeting, narrative constraints)

jobsync.role: candidate-facing workflow/decision surface - what to apply to, application status tracking
jobsync.integration: upstream-as-intended via event-based CLIs (jobpipe export-jobsync, jobpipe record-jobsync-event)
jobsync.canonical_ownership: stays in JobPipe (job evaluation state, claims, selection logic, evidence and narrative semantics)

crewai.role: prospective agent runtime for cooperative author/revise loop on cover letters + CV tailoring
crewai.integration: not yet integrated. Fork at larsvaerland/crewAI tracks crewaiinc/crewai upstream. Enters inside the author/revise agent layer only after JobPipe produces the deterministic tailored_cv_plan.
crewai.status: prospective - waits on T002 authoring MVP
crewai.canonical_ownership: stays in JobPipe - deterministic contracts (AuthoringCaseContext, GeneratedApplicationPackage, DocumentValidationResult) remain JobPipe-native and agent-runtime-swappable

authoring_mvp_lane.name: T002: AI document authoring MVP (cover letter + tailored CV)
authoring_mvp_lane.position_decision_notes: Option C (hybrid): deterministic contracts + validation stay JobPipe-native. crewAI enters only inside the author/revise agent layer. Contracts must be agent-runtime-swappable so the product is not locked to a specific agent framework. Data is the product, the engine is JobPipe, agent frameworks are pluggable.

contracts.AuthoringCaseContext: immutable frozen dataclass - candidate + job + evidence bundle going into author
contracts.GeneratedApplicationPackage: pydantic model - cover_letter_draft + tailored_cv_projection + evidence_refs + gap_notes + validation
contracts.DocumentValidationResult: pydantic model - passed + score + failures + warnings

authoring_mvp_lane.first_slice: Issue #58 - audit existing application_pack paths, define AuthoringCaseContext
authoring_mvp_lane.parked_reason: Supabase / crewAI runtime / hosted shell explicitly out of scope for MVP per governing spec

open_risks: specs/job-claims-model.md 'First implementation slice' items 1-6 are drifted vs. code (already implemented) and should be reconciled in a follow-up docs-hygiene slice.
Python 3.14 + anyio plugin autoload breaks pytest on Windows; validation depends on a workaround. A follow-up slice should add a pytest config or pin plugins.

T002 Option C requires that the author/revise contract layer stays agent-runtime-swappable. If the first slice couples tightly to crewAI primitives, the product locks to a specific agent framework and loses the pluggability Option C was chosen for.

Post-unification: any clone of the old origin/main (tip b8bc34c) will require git fetch --prune + hard reset to match the new main. Archive tag oss-main-pre-unify preserves the old tip for provenance.

recent_decisions.decision: Op 2 executed end-to-end: PR #90 merged (merge commit 9446998), archive tag oss-main-pre-unify pushed, origin/main force-updated to 9446998, docs/integrations/README.md landed.
recent_decisions.rationale: All slices completed with founder sign-off at each RED GATE. Main now reflects the unified private-lane codebase; old main preserved under tag for provenance.

recent_decisions.decision: Op 2 path B (archive + force-update) over path A (merge --allow-unrelated-histories)
recent_decisions.rationale: Path A preserves unrelated main lineage in permanent history. Path B gives a clean single-lineage OSS story with a preserved archive tag for provenance. Paid/multi-user work has not yet started; private lane is the intended OSS state.

recent_decisions.decision: T002 Option C (hybrid) for crewAI positioning
recent_decisions.rationale: Deterministic contracts + validation stay JobPipe-native; crewAI enters inside the author/revise agent layer only. Preserves 'data is the product, JobPipe is the engine' invariant. Keeps the agent runtime pluggable so the product is not locked to any single framework.

recent_decisions.decision: Upstream fork model: use reactive-resume and jobsync upstream-as-intended via slim JSON/event seams. crewAI fork is prospective and waits on T002.
recent_decisions.rationale: Slim seams keep JobPipe modular. If any upstream goes stale or something better appears, the adapter is replaceable. Minimum integration = minimum maintenance burden.

coordinator_leverage_scaffolding.purpose: One-time Opus work so Sonnet planner + Codex implementer can run cheap and stable without coordinator re-routing per slice.

active_sprint.sprint_goal: Deterministic contract layer + first authoring plumbing below the agent runtime. Option C compliant. No crewAI imports.
active_sprint.coordinator_reengage_at: All 5 slices merged, OR Approval Gate trips, OR scope expands beyond governing spec.
